art_highlights: Aurora & Athena Auction House hosting March 2026 Major Fine Art Sale, featuring Andy Warhol and Konstantin Korovin
Palm Springs Art Festival open March 21-22
Global art market grew 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion, driven by high-value works
Primary market gender representation reached parity (50% of gallery artists are women)

market_summary.key_drivers: Global art market seeing cautious optimism, shift towards human hand and emotional depth
market_summary.trend: Continued interest in major fine art sales alongside focus on local art festivals
